title: zelkova cretica
intro: Zelkova cretica, also known as the Greek zelkova, is a deciduous tree native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Zelkova cretica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
